title: ornithogalum longifolium
intro: Ornithogalum longifolium, also known as the snake's tongue or green-leafed star of Bethlehem, is a perennial plant species in the family Asparagaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ornithogalum longifolium include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be supervised by a healthcare professional due to potential side effects.
